# MOLT BLOCKS INDEX

This first pass publishes selected baseline public-safe categories plus the first dedicated subject-adjacent libraries for AIM, USE, and NEED.

## Published categories
- blueprints
- directives
- instructions
- subjects
- primary
- philosophy
- aim
- use
- need

## AIM / USE / NEED
These three libraries are published as dedicated top-level public-safe library files plus matching HUMAN natural-language descriptions.

Machine-facing JSON:
- `AI/MOLT-BLOCKS/aim.library.v1.0.0.json`
- `AI/MOLT-BLOCKS/use.library.v1.0.0.json`
- `AI/MOLT-BLOCKS/need.library.v1.0.0.json`

Human-facing docs:
- `HUMAN/MOLT-BLOCKS/aim/AIM-LIBRARY-v1.0.0.md`
- `HUMAN/MOLT-BLOCKS/use/USE-LIBRARY-v1.0.0.md`
- `HUMAN/MOLT-BLOCKS/need/NEED-LIBRARY-v1.0.0.md`
